summary: Heavy focus on a SaaS crypto trading platform rewrite and AI/ML research for trading, alongside embedded firmware for HID emulation, a Windows input driver, and several computer vision and automation side projects.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Developed a KMDF input filter driver for capturing and injecting keyboard and mouse events on Windows.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Built out the .NET rewrite of a crypto algo-trading platform, adding proxy infrastructure, billing, strategy templates, and an MCP server.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID emulation firmware
items.description: Iterated on feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for ESP32-S3, drafting new hardware variants.

items.title: Computer vision aim assist tool
items.description: Worked on a personal C++ project involving YOLO-based aim assist with overlay and input emulation.

items.title: Clash proxy client fork
items.description: Updated a Clash client fork with new transport support and rebased proxy dependencies.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted deep learning experiments on mixture-of-experts architectures for cryptocurrency price prediction.

items.title: Android LLM assistant
items.description: Built an on-device LLM chat assistant with tool-use, sub-agent delegation, and background wake capabilities.

items.title: E-ink note-taking launcher
items.description: Developed an Android launcher centered around note-taking for E-ink devices.

items.title: Custom e-reader firmware
items.description: Extended custom firmware for an e-reader with a map viewer and knowledge base application.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging
items.description: Polished a Windows Explorer extension for tagging files and folders, including CI/CD and Microsoft Store publishing.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Developed a graph-powered code intelligence engine with LSP integration and multi-language support.

items.title: Neovim development environment
items.description: Set up and maintained a personal Neovim configuration for full IDE capabilities.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a minimalistic, browser-based labeling tool for YOLO object detection datasets.

items.title: Online poker computer vision
items.description: Worked on a computer vision pipeline for extracting hand histories from online poker video recordings.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Maintained a fork of a Telegram client node for n8n workflow automation.

items.title: Claude Code n8n node
items.description: Updated a custom n8n node integrating the Claude Agent SDK for AI coding tasks.

items.title: Task management app
items.description: Started a task management application with touch event visualization.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Launched the initial .NET rewrite of a crypto algo-trading platform with AI and neural network features.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID emulation firmware
items.description: Developed multiple firmware versions for mouse and keyboard emulation on ESP32-S3, adding BLE and USB touch support.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Created and optimized numerous algorithmic trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot framework.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Contributed to an autonomous multi-session AI coding tool, adding worktree management and git rules features.

items.title: Freqtrade Telegram bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for monitoring and managing multiple Freqtrade trading instances.

items.title: Freqtrade mobile monitor
items.description: Developed a Flutter mobile app for monitoring Freqtrade bot performance and profits.

items.title: Telegram automation tools
items.description: Worked on a personal C# assistant for Telegram content forwarding and summarization.

items.title: Telegram content collector
items.description: Built a C# tool for collecting and filtering content from Telegram channels.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized algorithmic trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot.

items.title: Crypto trading signal bot
items.description: Built a Python bot for generating and posting crypto trading signals with AI-powered analysis.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Maintained a .NET Telegram bot providing ChatGPT access.
